def negative_python_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_reflection_inspection_in_hot_path():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_reflection_inspection_in_hot_path"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag inspect/signature/reflection work in hot paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
